recap_details.current_recap: You've been coordinating the Microsoft Suite migration with your team, walking them through the Azure Portal login and Microsoft Entra ID setup process, while also checking in on the BMW meeting status. You asked for a comprehensive update to be shared by end of day once any outstanding issues are resolved. Separately, you're in active negotiations on a potential deal—discussing revenue multiples, burn rate projections, and IP compliance requirements. You're evaluating a 2.8x revenue valuation and plan to discuss it with your board chair. One key point you're holding firm on: securing the CTO with a 3-year lock-in period rather than the proposed 2 years.
